nasb.text: A sword against their horses and against their chariots And against all the foreigners who are in the midst of her, And they will become women! A sword against her treasures, and they will be plundered!

esv.text: A sword against her horses and against her chariots, and against all the foreign troops in her midst, that they may become women! A sword against all her treasures, that they may be plundered!

cnv.text: 刀劍必攻擊它的馬匹和戰車， 攻擊它境內所有外族的人， 他們必像婦女一樣柔弱； 刀劍必攻擊它的一切寶庫， 它們必被搶掠；

ccb.text: 敌人要攻击巴比伦人的战车战马和他们的盟军， 使他们柔弱得像妇女； 敌人要攻打他们的库房， 肆意抢夺他们的财宝。
